groups.group_name: descriptive name for this group of related moves
groups.works_when: when/why these moves are effective (be musical, not just statistical)

move_intelligence.top_insight: single most important insight about what moves work and why (1-2 sentences, be specific and musical)

recipes.name: recipe name (musical, e.g. 'groove-first build')
recipes.critical_step: the step that matters most and why

evolution_recipes.best_recipe_summary: the most reliable path to a high-rated pattern (1-2 sentences)
